Health Reports
CURRENT STATUS Your condition is\nstable
Daily vitals show consistent patterns over the last 7 days.
Medication\nAdherence
85% Goal: 100%
You took 85% of your medications this week. You missed only 2 evening doses.
Symptoms\nOverview
Mild fatigue reported more frequently on Wednesday and Saturday.
AI Insights
Try not to miss evening doses to maintain consistent levels.
Symptoms increased this week; monitor fatigue levels closely tomorrow.
